notices.title: Prototype live update test
notices.body: Prototype live update test: guest names are now supported.

notices.title: OmniVoice Studio provider added
notices.body: Voice Studio now supports OmniVoice Studio as a local/free desktop-first voice workflow. Generate Lexi's voice in OmniVoice, export audio, import it into Voice Studio, then use it for voice testing or message playback. Android-native OmniVoice remains future until we confirm the engine can run or be called from Android.

notices.title: Voice Studio v0.1
notices.body: Voice Studio is now wired for per-character voice settings, provider presets, Test Voice, speaker buttons, and optional autoplay. Install the latest APK for the new mobile UI code; future provider preset changes can arrive live.

notices.title: Live updates vs APK updates
notices.body: Content, noticeboard, provider presets, and configuration can update live. Native/WebView fixes still require installing the latest APK when the manifest says an update is required.

notices.title: API key testing fix
notices.body: API key testing has been improved. Provider tests now use safer defaults and accept valid provider responses even when the response body is unusual. Install the latest APK build for the Android-side bridge fix.

notices.title: Mobile shell test is ready
notices.body: Use this PWA view to check phone layout, touch targets, offline cache, and remote-only tool messaging before APK packaging.

notices.title: Desktop tools stay visible
notices.body: Blender, Godot, and STL tools show synced logs/assets/results on mobile, but local execution is blocked on phone and must run on the desktop host.

notices.title: Prototype live update test
notices.body: Prototype live update test: guest names are now supported.

model_mode_config.label: Bundled Lite Model
model_mode_config.description: Use a bundled mobile/local-friendly model once packaged.

model_mode_config.label: BYOK API Mode
model_mode_config.description: User supplies their own API key on-device or per account.

model_mode_config.label: Offline Lite Mode
model_mode_config.description: Use cached UI and bundled model if installed.

model_mode_config.label: Demo Mode
model_mode_config.description: Open the UI without private tools or heavy execution.

provider_test_config.cors_fallback: If provider CORS blocks WebView fetch, use proxy_url from live manifest or the legacy native bridge.

voice_provider_presets.label: None / silent mode
voice_provider_presets.description: Chat remains silent. Speaker buttons stay hidden unless a voice is configured.

voice_provider_presets.label: OmniVoice Studio
workflow: Use for message playback or voice testing
voice_provider_presets.description: OmniVoice is local/free, but mobile support depends on whether we can run or call the engine from Android.
